queue.emptyBaseline: No baseline yet. Click 'Set Baseline' to run and lock one.
queue.emptyQueue: No queue items. Change build settings and add to queue.
queue.baselineOnlySingleScene: Baseline is only supported for single-scene simulation. Disable Sim All Zones/Solos.
queue.baselineNoLabyrinth: Queue baseline does not support labyrinth simulation yet. Disable Sim Labyrinth options.
queue.baselineReminderBody: Lower baseline rounds can make results more volatile. If you want a steadier baseline, adjust the round count in Settings first.
queue.baselineRecommendationHint: Recommended: at least 10 rounds, with 20-30 as the usual stable range; use 50+ when expected differences are very small.
queue.baselineReminderAggregationHint: Set Baseline runs multiple rounds using the current baseline round count and uses the aggregated result as the queue comparison baseline.
queue.baselineSummaryAggregationHint: Baseline values shown here come from multi-round robust aggregation: the simulator runs the configured baseline rounds and blends winsorized means with medians instead of showing a single sample.
queue.baselineNeedsResetAfterImport: Queue changes were imported. Please click 'Set Baseline' again to refresh baseline metrics.
queue.partyChangedSinceBaseline: Party members or teammate configs changed since baseline. Click 'Set Baseline' again before adding or running queue variants.
queue.requireImportBeforeBaseline: Please import user data for the current player before setting baseline.

multiRound.scoreModelValue: Performance/Stability/Cost weighted by configured settings (quantile mapped to 5-95, with confidence penalty)
multiRound.scoreModelParamPerformance: Performance: DPS, No RNG Profit/day, XP/h and Kills/h gains are rank-mapped within the batch to 5-95, then combined using the current queue subweights. Higher is better.
multiRound.scoreModelParamPerformanceSubweights: Current performance subweights: Profit {{profit}}% / XP {{xp}}% / DPS {{dps}}% / Kills {{kills}}%.
multiRound.scoreModelParamStability: Stability: the average CV across the four metrics is rank-mapped within the batch to 5-95. Lower volatility scores higher.
multiRound.scoreModelParamCost: Cost: upgrade cost, purchase time, and the selected gold per 0.01% metric are each mapped to 5-95 (cost metrics use log scaling first). Lower cost scores higher.
multiRound.scoreModelParamGoldPerPointValidity: Strict gold per 0.01% is shown only when the final robust deltas for DPS, No RNG Profit/day, XP/h and Kills/h are all positive. Otherwise it is marked N/A.
multiRound.scoreModelParamCompositeGoldPerPoint: Composite gold per 0.01% uses the same current performance subweights (Profit {{profit}}% / XP {{xp}}% / DPS {{dps}}% / Kills {{kills}}%). It is shown when that weighted composite delta is positive, and can be selected for Cost Score in Settings.
multiRound.scoreModelParamRobustWinsorize: Robust stats - winsorize: applies two-sided {{winsorPct}}% winsorization per metric to suppress outlier rounds.
multiRound.scoreModelParamRobustMedianBlend: Robust stats - median blend: robust delta = winsorized mean {{meanWeight}}% + median {{medianWeight}}%.
multiRound.scoreModelParamRobustConfidencePenalty: Robust stats - confidence penalty: confidence is estimated from sample size and 95% CI width, then final score = base score × ({{baseWeight}}% + {{penaltyWeight}}% × confidence).
multiRound.scoreInvalidZeroLegend: * means this score is forced to 0 due to invalid data (missing/NaN/non-computable), not a normal last-place score.

settingsPage.queueScoringSectionHint: Choose how final ranking combines Performance, Stability, and Cost, and whether Performance should prioritize Profit or XP more heavily.
settingsPage.queueExecutionSectionHint: Control how the queue runs, whether it uses serial or parallel mode, and which active player or locked party snapshot the run follows.
settingsPage.queueSamplingSectionHint: Tune round counts, baseline sampling, and whether multi-round aggregation should lean more toward the robust average or a typical round.
settingsPage.costScoreGoldMetricHint: Only affects which gold-per-0.01% metric is used in Cost Score. Both strict and composite columns remain visible in Multi-round Results.
settingsPage.queueResetSuccess: Queue settings reset to defaults and saved.
settingsPage.queueSaveErrorInvalidWeight: Invalid weights: each value must be between 0 and 100.
settingsPage.queueSaveErrorCostScoreGoldMetric: Invalid cost score metric. Please choose again.
settingsPage.queueSaveErrorParallelLimit: Invalid parallel worker limit: enter an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.
settingsPage.queueSaveErrorParallelLimitByCore: Parallel worker limit cannot exceed current core count {{cores}}.
settingsPage.queueSaveErrorUnsupportedTriggerChange: Queue includes trigger condition changes. Equipment set templates cannot save them yet.
settingsPage.medianBlendHint: Lower values lean toward the robust average across all rounds. Higher values lean toward the median, which behaves more like a typical round and resists extreme spikes or crashes.
settingsPage.queueRunWeightHint: Profit and XP weights are applied first. Any remaining weight is split evenly between DPS and Kills.
settingsPage.queueRunWeightBreakdown: Current performance split: Profit {{profit}}% / XP {{xp}}% / DPS {{dps}}% / Kills {{kills}}%.
settingsPage.queueSaveErrorStorage: Failed to save queue settings. Check browser storage permissions.
settingsPage.queueSaveErrorMissingControls: Settings controls are missing. Refresh the page and try again.
settingsPage.playerDataDescription: Manually save/restore build data for 5 players only.
settingsPage.playerSnapshotNoData: No player snapshot data is currently saved.
settingsPage.playerSaveError: Failed to save player configs. Check browser storage permissions.
settingsPage.playerLoadNotFound: No player config snapshot found. Save one first.
settingsPage.playerLoadInvalid: Player config snapshot is invalid and cannot be restored.
settingsPage.promptGoHomeAfterRestore: Player configs restored. Go to Home page now?
settingsPage.playerDeleteError: Failed to delete player snapshot data. Check browser storage permissions.

home.batchHint: Batch mode will run multiple targets and aggregate results in the Home results section.

home.homeResultsEmpty: Your next simulation result will appear here as soon as it finishes.
home.homeResultsRunning: Simulation is running. Results will appear here automatically.
home.workspaceDesc: Keep key metrics visible while you configure and run simulations.
home.workspaceBaseDesc: Configure the active player, target, and run settings without leaving the main workflow.
home.workspaceBuildDesc: Tune equipment, consumables, and abilities without burying the run controls.
home.workspaceAdvancedDesc: Review the full derived combat attributes for the current build.
home.workspaceImportExportDesc: Open the import/export workspace for full player or group config transfer.
home.workspaceExperimentalDesc: Run JSON batch experiments and inspect developer-only simulation controls.
home.workspaceStatusRunningDesc: Progress and summary metrics stay visible while the simulation runs.
home.workspaceStatusReadyDesc: Latest results are ready. Open the full report whenever you want deeper detail.
home.workspaceStatusIdleDesc: Start a simulation to populate the workspace summary and results area.

home.completeResultsRunningDesc: The full report stays collapsed until you want the detailed breakdown, while progress remains visible here.

home.completeResultsCollapsed: Keep the full report collapsed until you need detailed breakdowns.

settings.importQueueChangesConfirmWarningWithBase: This will overwrite current queue items and clear custom upgrade cost mappings, then run baseline simulation immediately.

settings.phase2Note2: This step adds trigger editing, equipment set management, wipe-event viewer, and patch-note viewer.

settings.msgQueueChangesImportedNeedBaseline: Queue changes imported from {{name}}: {{count}} items. Please click 'Set Baseline' again on Queue page.
settings.msgQueueChangesImportedAndBaselineReset: Queue changes imported from {{name}}: {{count}} items. Baseline has been reset.

settings.priceHint: Home results and Queue profit metrics use these modes with vendor fallback.
settings.patchNotesPreviewHint: Showing first {{count}} patch notes by default.
settings.priceSearchPlaceholder: Search by item name or HRID
settings.msgNoPriceOverrides: No manual price overrides to clear.
settings.mainSiteImportScriptDescription: Install the Tampermonkey helper to import the current character, including guild shrine combat buffs, or a cached team from Home, and to import current-character data from Enhancement or Skilling. Enhancement and Skilling character imports last only for the current page session.

advisor.title: Farm Advisor
advisor.zoneFilterHint: No zones checked = scan all zones.
advisor.desc: Use your current team, buffs, achievements, housing, pricing, and run duration to rank the best farming targets across solo zones and group zones.
advisor.scoreExplainTitle: How the Composite Score and Confidence are computed
advisor.scoreExplainCompositeHeading: How is the composite score computed?
advisor.scoreExplainComposite1: Each target is rated on 3 metrics: Daily Profit, XP/h, and Safety (derived from Deaths/h). Kills/h is shown for reference only and does not affect the composite score.
advisor.scoreExplainComposite2: Each metric is compared against all candidates to produce a 0–100 relative score.
advisor.scoreExplainComposite3: Scores are weighted by your chosen goal preset (Balanced / Profit / XP / Safe / Custom) into a base score.
advisor.scoreExplainConfidence1: Reflects how consistent results are across multiple scans — the closer the per-run data, the higher confidence.
advisor.scoreExplainConfidence2: Sample size: more rounds → higher confidence (10–20 refine rounds approaches the ceiling).
advisor.scoreExplainConfidence3: Run-to-run variance: the smaller the variance in profit / XP / deaths across rounds, the higher confidence.
advisor.scoreExplainConfidence4: The penalty for low confidence is small (~15%); even at 0% confidence the final score still preserves 85% of the base score.
advisor.noCards: Run the advisor to generate quick picks and top cards.
advisor.noResults: No advisor results yet. Click 'Run Advisor' to scan current farming targets.
advisor.tableSummary: {{rows}} rows ranked, {{refined}} validated by refine step.
advisor.errorNoPlayer: Please select at least one player.
advisor.errorBuildPlayer: Unable to build player simulation data.
advisor.errorNoTargets: No advisor targets available for the current filters.
advisor.errorNoSuccess: Advisor scan did not produce any successful result.
advisor.errorPartialQuick: {{count}} target(s) failed during quick scan. Showing successful results only.
advisor.errorPartialRefine: {{count}} target(s) failed during refine step. Showing successful results only.

enhancement.title: Enhancement Simulator
enhancement.startingItemPriceMissing: No direct market quote exists for this enhancement level.
enhancement.acquisitionEstimateMissing: Required entry-key or chest-key asks are missing, so an acquisition estimate cannot be calculated.
enhancement.acquisitionEstimateNote: The acquisition estimate uses key asks minus the expected liquidation value of other chest drops. Dungeon time, consumables, and drops earned during the run are excluded.
enhancement.selectItemForMaterials: Select an item to load its material prices.
enhancement.emptyAnalysis: Choose an item and valid levels to compare enhancement strategies.
enhancement.expectedResetsHelp: Expected failures from +1 or above that return to +0; failures at +0 are excluded.
enhancement.noStrategies: No strategies available for the current configuration.
enhancement.mirrorUnavailable: Mirror plan is unavailable for this target.
enhancement.fallbackEstimatedLoad: Monte Carlo skipped for estimated load
enhancement.fallbackHardLimit: Monte Carlo stopped at the transition limit
enhancement.noRiskResult: Run risk analysis to calculate cost percentiles and budget probability.
enhancement.riskSelectItemError: Select an enhanceable item before running risk analysis.
enhancement.riskStartingPriceError: A direct market quote or price override is required for the starting enhancement level.
enhancement.riskMaterialPriceError: A price is required for every enhancement material.
enhancement.riskProtectionPriceError: A priced protection item is required for cost analysis.
enhancement.routeEmpty: Select an enhanceable item to begin

skilling.title: Skilling Upgrade Planner
skilling.costModeDescription: Prioritizes the plan with the lowest net cost per experience.
skilling.balancedModeDescription: Uses the planner's lowest-net-cost-per-XP full-level route for the current level as the baseline, then compares its full-level candidates. It prefers a shorter candidate only when its net cost per XP is no greater than baseline + {{percent}}% of |baseline|.
skilling.balancedCostToleranceHint: Controls how much higher the current level's net cost per XP may be than its lowest-cost baseline. A higher value allows faster but more expensive routes.
skilling.balancedCostToleranceChanged: The existing result used {{resultPercent}}%; the current {{currentPercent}}% setting takes effect after recalculation.
skilling.speedModeDescription: Prioritizes the shortest estimated time for the current level.
skilling.optimizationModeCommonRules: All three modes calculate and show costs. Plans without required ask prices remain unavailable, and the route is recalculated after every level using the latest inventory, drinks, and Buff state.
skilling.stale: Results are stale because targets, prices, optimization settings, or the character snapshot changed.
skilling.expiredBuffWarning: {{count}} temporary Buff(s) expired and were excluded.
skilling.processingUnsupportedWarning: Processing effects and Processing Tea are not yet included in foraging output values; foraging routes are optimized without them.
skilling.oldSnapshotWarning: This character snapshot is more than 30 minutes old.
skilling.nextLevelCostPerXp: Net cost / XP to next level
skilling.nextLevelMaterialPurchasePerXp: Material purchases / XP to next level
skilling.stagedEquipment: Changes by stage ({{count}} loadouts; see details)
